metadata.description: Utah 2026 antlerless elk hunt opportunities dataset built from the official DWR hunt planner boundary table and 2025 DWR remaining permits season labels.
metadata.notes: Antlerless elk permits prioritized for planning, including private-land-only antlerless elk and the antlerless elk-control permit. Season labels are carried forward from 2025 until updated 2026 field regulations are published.

records.title: General-season antlerless elk
records.sourceGuide: 2025 Utah DWR remaining permits page and official DWR hunt planner boundary table (used provisionally for 2026 until updated field regs are published)
records.sourcePage: DWR remaining permits + hunt planner boundary table
